what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
standouts: It acts as a cross-reference artifact between a channel attachment and a board item
The target uses a board:// URI scheme
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
Leaves the body empty when no narrative content is needed
concerns: The file contains no content beyond metadata, so its utility depends entirely on external resolution of the board:// target
The relationship semantics are implicit rather than explicit
notes: A metadata-only channel attachment pointing to board item item-89edf449 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does board item item-89edf449 represent?
What specific role does the board_items attachment_type denote?
Was this attachment generated automatically or manually?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated, but the fields match the pattern of recording an attachment-to-board-item linkage; actual content is consistent with that inferred purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record and timestamp the association between attachment att-9e1abb28 and board item item-89edf449 for retrieval or provenance.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme in the target field is a distinct convention for referencing board items.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped link between an attachment identifier and a board item, supporting lookup, provenance, and cross-reference without requiring narrative content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record in dragnet-development of type board_items that targets board item item-89edf449 and was added on 2026-06-24.
